global.description: The ad features a bold blue background with prominent text and interactive elements.
global.main_message: The ad promotes a secure and simple service with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold, white headline text that reads 'Secure & simple' is prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: A smaller white text below the headline states 'No hidden fees', adding clarity to the message.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one square, are rendered in a lighter blue shade.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Start now' in white, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo labeled 'EarnPath' is positioned at the top left corner, featuring a simple design.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' is placed at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern minimalist with bold colors, secure service, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the body text is below it, the call to action is at the bottom, and the logo is at the top left.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Secure & simple, No hidden fees, Start now, EarnPath, UGC
